content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Thorough review of the success reconciliation handler implementation. The code is well-structured with correct idempotency (double-close handling via is_bead_already_closed + fallback check), crash-safe sync (unconditional sync after close even on replays, with clear rationale for why was_already_closed is not a safe proxy for sync completion), proper error escalation (br close/sync failures transition the task to Failed rather than silently swallowing), atomic hint persistence (tmp+rename), and comprehensive test coverage (10 unit/integration tests all passing, including end-to-end milestone state verification and a regression test for RunStatus::Completed dispatch). The daemon_loop integration correctly skips rebase/ensure_project for reconciliation-only retries (is_reconciliation_retry check), places reconciliation BEFORE mark_completed for crash-safe ordering, and handles mark_failed-itself-failing by retaining the lease for stale-lease recovery. No bugs, safety problems, or significant correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
